title: 12 Month of Free Trial and 50% Discount from DevRev
description: At DevRev, we help startups like yours become the world’s most customer-centric companies by connecting product teams (Dev) to support (Rev). Our platform unifies your tools and teams through an AI-driven knowledge graph, giving you a real-time, 360-degree view of customer feedback, product development, and team productivity - all in one place.
eligibility: AWS Activate members who meet the offer's current provider, account, and regional requirements.
value: 12 Month of Free Trial and 50% Discount from DevRev
